description: Mock application packet: 'Al Marjan Consulting FZC', a two-shareholder Free Zone Company applying to RAKEZ for a Consulting/Services licence with an Executive Office facility. All values are fabricated illustrative data (not a real business, TRN, IBAN, or passport), constructed to exercise: legalForm=free_zone_company (the FZC/multi-shareholder pathway, as opposed to a single-shareholder FZE), a natural-person Shareholder 1 (shareholderMotherName populated), licenseType=consulting_services, standardFacilityType=executive_office (exercising both standardFacilitySpecification and standardFacilitySizeSqm, which only apply to three of the five Standard Facility options), and managerResidencyStatusInUae=true (exercising the conditionally-required managerNocFromSponsor document). flexiFacilityType/retailFacilityParkLocation/warehouse*/plotOfLand* are all left unset since only one Facility Details subsection applies per application, per the source form's own mutually-exclusive section structure (see VERIFICATION.md).

data.activityDetails: Management consultancy services for small and medium enterprises across the GCC.
data.shareholderAddressContact: Villa 14, Al Hamra Village, Ras Al Khaimah, UAE. Phone: +971501112233. Email: yusuf.alzaabi@example.ae
data.standardFacilitySpecification: Single-occupant executive office, Al Hamra Business Centre, 3rd Floor
data.howDidYouHearAboutRakFtz: Referral from an existing RAKEZ licensee
data.licenceCollectorLocation: RAKEZ Business Centre, Al Hamra, Ras Al Khaimah
